$comment: Open/proprietary partition for the open-core SDK boundary lint — POST-MOVE
(Phase 3 of the consumable-packaging build). The partition is now PHYSICAL:
the OPEN set is the entire source trees of the two extracted packages
(packages/sdk/src, packages/protocol/src); everything under the repo root
src/ is the proprietary wrapper/harness. The pre-move file-level regex
openRootFiles over ^src/) is obsolete — the carved-out proprietary files
config/{liveApply,catalog}.ts, commands minus types.ts, agent minus
createAgent.ts, router minus capabilities.ts) stayed BEHIND in root src/.
this manifest: no open-package source file may depend (value OR type) on
wrapper code, in EITHER form — a relative path escaping the package (which
resolves under ^src/) or the root package name (@yevgetman/sov, whether it
appears unresolved as the raw specifier or resolved through node_modules).
same two package dirs, hardcoded there by the same by-construction logic.
$commentEngine: the open SDK must stay VENDOR-NEUTRAL — it may never depend (value OR
type) on the proprietary conduct engine @yevgetman/decorum, which the
root wrapper binds via an injected ConductProvider port. The attestation
as plain strings for exactly this reason; this rule makes the invariant
mechanical rather than review-enforced (review fix wave 2026-07-19).
